CustomField.description: fields missing at the current stage
CustomField.formula:
IF( AND( TEXT(StageName) = "Closed Lost" , TEXT( Closed_Reason__c ) = "" ) , "•Closed Reason;" ,"" ) & IF(TEXT(Application_Segment__c )="","•Application Segment;","") & IF(TEXT(Application_Market__c )="","•Application Market;","") & IF(TEXT(Application__c )="","•Application;","")
/*You can not include 'Closed Reason Detail' as it is Long Text Area and not allowed in formulas*/
CustomField.inlineHelpText: fields missing at the current stage
CustomField.label: fxMissingFields_CL
